title: Gateway Startup And Runtime Performance
objective: Measure cold start, warm start, health latency, memory, CPU, and user-facing command latency for a target OpenClaw runtime.

phases.title: Cold Start
phases.intent: Start a fresh gateway and capture readiness timing, process state, and logs.

phases.title: API Latency
phases.intent: Run user-facing status, plugin, and model commands and capture duration and gateway health after each.

phases.title: Warm Restart
phases.intent: Restart the gateway after runtime deps and registries are warm, then compare readiness and memory.
